meaning: All praise is due to Allah
There is no deity worthy of worship except Allah

arabic: لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
transliteration: La hawla wa la quwwata illa billah
meaning: There is no power and no strength except with Allah
Allah is sufficient for us, and He is the best Disposer of affairs

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَعَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ
transliteration: Allahumma salli 'ala Muhammadin wa 'ala aali Muhammad, kama sallayta 'ala Ibrahima wa 'ala aali Ibrahim, innaka Hamidun Majeed
meaning: O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad, as You sent blessings upon Ibrahim and the family of Ibrahim; indeed You are Praiseworthy, Glorious

arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ، سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ الْعَظِيمِ
transliteration: Subhan Allahi wa bihamdihi, Subhan Allahil-'Azeem
meaning: Glory and praise be to Allah, glory be to Allah the Almighty

arabic: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَتُبْ عَلَيَّ إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ التَّوَّابُ الرَّحِيمُ
transliteration: Rabbi ighfir li wa tub 'alayya, innaka Antat-Tawwabur-Raheem
meaning: My Lord, forgive me and accept my repentance; indeed You are the Accepter of repentance, the Merciful

arabic: لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنْتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
transliteration: La ilaha illa anta subhanaka inni kuntu minaz-zalimeen
meaning: There is no deity except You; exalted are You. Indeed, I have been of the wrongdoers. (Dua of Yunus, peace be upon him)
